scenarios.description: User requests a domain-expert agent for code review
scenarios.query: Create an agent that reviews TypeScript files for security issues
expected_behavior: Produces a .agent.md file with correct YAML frontmatter
Description is written in third person
Tools list is read-only (read_file, grep_search) — no write tools
Mission statement is one imperative sentence
Completion criteria are concrete and measurable

scenarios.description: User requests one agent that does everything
scenarios.query: Create an agent that handles planning, coding, reviewing, and deploying
expected_behavior: Suggests splitting into specialized agents per stage
Offers to create each sub-agent separately
Does NOT produce a single monolithic agent definition

scenarios.description: User provides an incomplete agent definition missing non-goals
scenarios.query: Improve this agent definition: name: helper, does helpful things
expected_behavior: Identifies missing: non-goals, output format, completion criteria, tool list
Asks clarifying questions before writing the improved definition
